description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the queeno/ubuntu-desktop Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs sudo, creates a "docker" user, adds it to the sudo group, and grants password‑less sudo. Define two stages: test and release. In the test stage add a test job that executes ./run common dev desktop server. In the release stage add a release job that echoes "Collecting artifacts" and stores the run, src, and configsets directories as artifacts.
